label: Recorder generic info
description: Read-only OS, ROS, network, service, process, and container diagnostics for recorder/LLM context.

commands.label: ROS environment
commands.command: env | grep -E '^(ROS_|AMENT_|COLCON_|RMW_|CYCLONEDDS_|FASTRTPS_)' | sort || echo '(no ROS env vars exported)'

commands.label: ROS 1 topics
commands.command: command -v rostopic >/dev/null 2>&1 && rostopic list || echo 'rostopic not available in PATH'

commands.label: ROS 1 nodes
commands.command: command -v rosnode >/dev/null 2>&1 && rosnode list || echo 'rosnode not available in PATH'

commands.label: ROS 2 topics
commands.command: command -v ros2 >/dev/null 2>&1 && ros2 topic list || echo 'ros2 not available in PATH'

commands.label: ROS 2 nodes
commands.command: command -v ros2 >/dev/null 2>&1 && ros2 node list || echo 'ros2 not available in PATH'

commands.label: Failed services
commands.command: systemctl --failed --no-pager --no-legend 2>/dev/null || echo 'systemctl unavailable or not permitted'

commands.label: Docker containers
commands.command: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Image}}\t{{.Status}}' || echo 'docker not available'
